generated_oml:
// Digital Twin instance (required for DTComponent restriction)
instance MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin representation of the MABI‑MAX 100 axis"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor I_M measuring electrical current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance MotorMountEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder providing motor shaft angle r_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox providing gearbox output angle r_G"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Live motor current time‑series streamed via MQTT"
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountEncoderSensor
    base:desc "Live motor shaft position time‑series (r_M) streamed via MQTT"
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
    base:desc "Live gearbox output position time‑series (r_G) streamed via MQTT"
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// Fusion of encoder data for derived calculations
instance EncoderFusionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountEncoderSensor, GearboxEncoderSensor
    base:desc "Fused encoder data combining motor shaft and gearbox output angles"
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// C10: Data
instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    base:desc "Measured motor current trace used for torque derivation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBrokerEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderFusionDataTransmitted
    base:desc "Derived torque calculated from encoder positions and motor current"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBrokerEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderFusionDataTransmitted
    base:desc "Computed angular velocity of the axis derived from encoder positions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBrokerEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transports live sensor time‑series from the robot controller to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution engine runs friction‑free and friction‑law models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualizes measured vs simulated torque/velocity traces and friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell integrates models and data into the Industry 4.0 ecosystem"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition and Internal Block Diagram describing structural topology of axis MABI‑MAX 100"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance SimulinkFrictionFreeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of friction‑free behavior of the axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngineEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction law"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngineEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngineEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngineEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngineEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction using combined white‑box (model) and black‑box (data) approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, UpdateControllerAction
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard visualizing measured and simulated torque/velocity traces and friction loss"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for the axis, displayed on the dashboard"
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance UpdateControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed derived friction parameters back into the robot controller to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

// Environment containing the components
instance MabiMaxAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorCurrentSensor, MotorMountEncoderSensor, GearboxEncoderSensor,
                 MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted,
                 GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted, EncoderFusionDataTransmitted,
                 MeasuredCurrentData, MeasuredTorqueData, MeasuredAngularVelocityData,
                 SysMLStructuralModel, SimulinkFrictionFreeModel, SimulinkCoulombViscousModel,
                 SimulinkStribeckModel, SimulinkDahlModel, SimulinkLuGreModel,
                 RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService,
                 MqttBrokerEnabler, MatlabSimulinkEngineEnabler,
                 DashboardVisualizationEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler,
                 FrictionParametersInsight, UpdateControllerAction
    base:desc "Environment that groups all physical and virtual components of the MABI‑MAX axis"
    base:isContainedIn MabiMaxAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, online processing of incoming MQTT data, enabling real‑time updating of friction models during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow composed of a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), an Asset (MABI first axis), Processing components (Simulation M, GW, GB) that consume measured DataTraces and produce simulated traces, and Model elements (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation) linked via the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational/run‑time stage focusing on the as‑operated physical system; the digital shadow leverages engineering models created during design."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each DataPoint to its source and processing component; validation by comparing simulated friction‑free and friction‑augmented outputs with measured data; continuous re‑identification to account for wear, temperature, and load variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot controller to the digital shadow over MQTT; the digital shadow consumes these streams for processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard and SysML modeling conventions as defined in the referenced Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]
